name: Texas Car Title and Payday Loan Services, Inc.
description_short: Lake Worth, TX is home to Texas Car Title and Payday Loan Services, Inc., a payday and title loan provider at 6620 Azle Ave offering fast cash solutions.
description_long:
Located at 6620 Azle Ave in Lake Worth, TX, Texas Car Title and Payday Loan Services, Inc. operates as a standalone storefront accessible to residents throughout the Lake Worth area. The location serves as a direct point of service for individuals seeking quick financial solutions in the Lake Worth community.

This Lake Worth, TX location offers payday loans, title loans, and related financial services. You can reach the branch directly at +1 817-237-2900 to discuss your borrowing needs, get application details, or ask about current rates and terms for their services.

For Lake Worth residents needing emergency funds or a short-term loan against your vehicle's title, having a local storefront on Azle Ave provides convenient access. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and information about your vehicle to expedite your application. Texas Car Title and Payday Loan Services, Inc. specializes in quick lending for immediate financial needs.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day or next-business-day funding after approval, often within 30 minutes
Offers up to $15,000 for title loans based on vehicle value, larger than typical payday loans
No traditional credit check required for title and payday loans
Online 24/7 title loan applications available without store visit
Keep and drive your vehicle while repaying a title loan (not a total surrender)
Local in-person service with specialists in Lake Worth and Tarrant County area
Installment loans with fixed monthly payments for predictable budgeting
Over 30 years of industry experience and 22,000+ customers served
cons: APR, interest rates, and fees are not disclosed on the website, limiting transparency before applying
Title loans carry high default and predatory lending risk due to vehicle collateral seizure
No disclosure of loan terms, repayment periods, or total cost of borrowing
Payday loans are typically expensive, short-term debt traps with rollover risks not addressed
Limited financial counseling or alternatives offered to help consumers avoid repeat borrowing
best_for: Consumers with paid-off vehicles who need emergency cash and cannot access traditional bank loans
Self-employed or gig workers with irregular income who lack paycheck stubs for bank loans
Individuals with poor credit scores locked out of credit unions and conventional lenders
Lake Worth and Tarrant County residents needing same-day or next-day cash for unexpected expenses
diagnosis: Best for Lake Worth-area residents with paid-off vehicles or stable income who face genuine emergencies and cannot access bank loans, but only after thoroughly reviewing all loan terms, APR, and fees before signing. The critical caveat is that title and payday loans are expensive short-term debt products with high cost of capital and significant default risk—they should be treated as last-resort emergency funds, not regular credit sources, and the company's lack of disclosed terms suggests consumers should request full fee and interest documentation before committing.
services: Texas title loans up to $15,000 based on vehicle value
Payday loans for short-term income-based cash advances
Installment loans with fixed monthly payments
Same-day or next-business-day electronic fund deposit
No credit check required for title and payday loans
Keep-and-drive title loan options (vehicle not surrendered)
Multi-product lending for Fort Worth, Azle, and Tarrant County communities
FAQ resources for payday, title, and installment loan products
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
